metadata.description: Batch 08 of 50 — Oxford 3000 words 701-800; lexical fields reviewed

words.definitionEn: to take goods or messages to a person or place
words.example: The courier will deliver the package tomorrow.

words.definitionEn: the act of taking goods or messages somewhere
a strong request or need; to ask firmly
words.definitionTh: ความต้องการ / เรียกร้อง

words.definitionEn: to show clearly how something works or is true
words.definitionTh: สาธิต / แสดงให้เห็น
words.example: The trainer demonstrated how to use the machine.

words.definitionEn: a person whose job is to care for teeth
words.example: I have an appointment with the dentist.

words.definitionEn: to say that something is not true
a division of an organization
words.example: She works in the finance department.

words.definitionEn: the act of leaving a place
words.definitionTh: การออกเดินทาง

words.definitionEn: to be decided or influenced by something
words.definitionTh: ขึ้นอยู่กับ
words.example: The result depends on the temperature.

words.definitionEn: very unhappy and without hope
words.example: He felt depressed after losing his job.

words.definitionEn: making someone feel very unhappy
the distance from the top to the bottom
words.example: Measure the depth of the water.

words.definitionEn: to say what someone or something is like
words that explain what something is like
a dry area with little rain; to leave someone or something
words.definitionTh: ทะเลทราย / ละทิ้ง
words.example: Very little rain falls in the desert.

words.definitionEn: to be worthy of something
words.definitionTh: สมควรได้รับ

words.definitionEn: a plan or drawing; to plan how something will be made
words.definitionTh: การออกแบบ / ออกแบบ

words.definitionEn: a person who plans how something will look or work
words.example: The designer created a new logo.

words.definitionEn: a strong wish; to want something
words.definitionTh: ความปรารถนา / ปรารถนา
words.example: She has a strong desire to learn.

words.definitionEn: a table used for working or studying
words.example: The report is on my desk.

words.definitionEn: feeling that a situation is extremely serious
words.definitionTh: สิ้นหวัง / ร้อนรน

words.definitionEn: without being affected by something
words.definitionTh: แม้ว่า / ทั้งที่

words.definitionEn: the place to which someone is going
words.definitionTh: จุดหมายปลายทาง

words.definitionEn: to damage something so badly that it no longer exists or works
a small fact or feature; to give full information
words.definitionTh: รายละเอียด / ให้รายละเอียด

words.definitionEn: including many facts or features
to discover or notice something
words.example: The sensor can detect small defects.

words.definitionEn: a person whose job is to investigate crimes
to discover or decide something exactly
words.definitionTh: กำหนด / ตรวจหา
words.example: The test will determine the cause.

words.definitionEn: having made a firm decision
to grow or cause something to become more advanced
words.example: The team will develop a new app.

words.definitionEn: the process of growing or becoming more advanced
a piece of equipment made for a particular purpose
a simple drawing that explains how something works
a conversation between two or more people
words.example: The dialogue between the characters was natural.

words.definitionEn: a very hard precious stone
words.example: The ring contains a small diamond.

words.definitionEn: a book in which someone records daily events
words.definitionTh: สมุดบันทึก
words.example: She writes in her diary every night.

words.definitionEn: a book or resource that explains words
words.example: Look up the word in a dictionary.

words.definitionEn: to stop being alive
the food and drink a person usually consumes
words.definitionTh: อาหารที่รับประทาน
words.example: A balanced diet supports good health.

words.definitionEn: the way in which things are not the same
words.definitionTh: ความแตกต่าง
words.example: There is a clear difference between the results.

words.definitionEn: not the same
in a way that is not the same
words.definitionTh: อย่างแตกต่าง

words.definitionEn: not easy to do or understand
a problem or something that is hard to do
words.definitionTh: ความยากลำบาก
words.example: We had difficulty finding the address.

words.definitionEn: to make a hole in the ground
words.example: They dug a hole in the garden.

words.definitionEn: using electronic signals or computer technology
words.example: The factory uses a digital system.

words.definitionEn: the main meal of the day
going straight; to control or guide
words.definitionTh: โดยตรง / กำกับ
words.example: This is the most direct route.

words.definitionEn: the way in which someone or something moves
words.example: The arrow shows the direction of flow.

words.definitionEn: in a straight or immediate way
a person who manages an organization or production
words.definitionTh: ผู้อำนวยการ

words.definitionEn: soil or an unclean substance
words.definitionTh: ดิน / สิ่งสกปรก
words.example: Wash the dirt off your hands.

words.definitionEn: not clean
something that makes success more difficult
words.example: High cost is a major disadvantage.

words.definitionEn: to have a different opinion
words.definitionTh: ไม่เห็นด้วย

words.definitionEn: to become impossible to see or find
unhappy because something was not as expected
words.example: She was disappointed with the result.

words.definitionEn: not as good as expected
words.definitionTh: น่าผิดหวัง

words.definitionEn: an event causing great damage or suffering
words.example: The flood was a major disaster.

words.definitionEn: a flat round object
words.example: Insert the disc into the drive.

words.definitionEn: training that produces controlled behavior; a field of study
words.definitionTh: วินัย / สาขาวิชา
words.example: Good discipline is important at work.

words.definitionEn: a reduction in price; to reduce a price
words.definitionTh: ส่วนลด / ลดราคา
words.example: The store offers a ten percent discount.

words.definitionEn: to find something for the first time
the act of finding something new
to talk about something in detail
words.example: We need to discuss the plan.

words.definitionEn: a conversation about a subject
words.definitionTh: การอภิปราย
words.example: The meeting included a useful discussion.

words.definitionEn: an illness affecting a person, animal, or plant
a container for food or food prepared in a particular way
words.definitionTh: จาน / อาหารจานหนึ่ง
words.example: This dish contains rice and vegetables.

words.definitionEn: not truthful or trustworthy
words.definitionTh: ไม่ซื่อสัตย์
words.example: It is dishonest to hide the truth.

words.definitionEn: to not like; a feeling of not liking
words.definitionTh: ไม่ชอบ / ความไม่ชอบ

words.definitionEn: to send someone away or refuse to consider something
words.definitionTh: ยกเลิก / ไล่ออก

words.definitionEn: to show something; an arrangement for people to see
words.definitionTh: แสดง / การจัดแสดง

words.definitionEn: the amount of space between two places
words.example: The distance between the stations is five kilometres.

words.definitionEn: to give or deliver things to several people or places
words.example: Workers distribute food to local families.

words.definitionEn: the act of supplying things to people or places
words.definitionTh: การแจกจ่าย

words.definitionEn: an area of a town or country
words.example: She lives in the northern district.

words.definitionEn: to separate into parts; a division
words.definitionTh: แบ่ง / เส้นแบ่ง
words.example: Divide the cake into eight pieces.

words.definitionEn: the act of separating or a section of an organization
words.definitionTh: การแบ่ง / ฝ่าย
words.example: He works in the sales division.

words.definitionEn: legally no longer married
to perform an action; used as an auxiliary verb
words.example: What do you do at work?

words.definitionEn: a person trained to treat illness
a written or electronic record; to record information
words.definitionTh: เอกสาร / บันทึก

words.definitionEn: a film or program giving facts about a subject
words.example: We watched a documentary about oceans.

words.definitionEn: a common animal kept as a pet or for work
words.example: The dog is sleeping by the door.

words.definitionEn: a unit of money used in several countries
relating to the home or within one country
words.definitionTh: ภายในประเทศ / เกี่ยวกับบ้าน
words.example: Domestic flights leave from this terminal.

words.definitionEn: to control or be the most important
to give money or goods to help a person or organization
a movable barrier used to enter or leave a place
twice as much; to become twice as much
words.definitionTh: สองเท่า / เพิ่มเป็นสองเท่า

words.definitionEn: a feeling of uncertainty; to feel uncertain
words.definitionTh: ความสงสัย / สงสัย
words.example: I doubt that the machine is ready.

words.definitionEn: toward or in a lower position
words.definitionTh: ลง / ข้างล่าง

words.definitionEn: to copy data from a network to a device; such a copy
words.definitionTh: ดาวน์โหลด / ไฟล์ดาวน์โหลด
words.example: Download the file to your computer.

words.definitionEn: on or to a lower floor
toward a lower place or level
words.definitionTh: ลงด้านล่าง

words.definitionEn: a group of twelve
a preliminary version; to prepare a first version
words.definitionTh: ร่าง / ร่างเอกสาร
words.example: She prepared the first draft of the report.

words.definitionEn: to pull something along a surface
words.example: Do not drag the box across the floor.

words.definitionEn: a play for theatre, radio, or television
